ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully holding a jar.  The movement starts with arms extended to receive the jar, then gently lowers the jar to a safe place. The sequence uses subtle movements to highlight the robot's care in handling the jar. Frame 1 shows arms extended outward and upward, preparing to receive the jar. Frame 2 shows the jar being held at chest height. Frame 3 shows the jar being lowered, and Frame 4 shows the jar safely placed. The right arm assists the left arm, adding a sense of support and balance.  The left arm does most of the work, carefully handling the jar. The right arm stays slightly elevated for stability and to avoid any accidental collisions.

frames.beat: arms extend up and out to receive the jar
gently lifting the jar to the chest with care
slowly lowering the jar, steady and controlled
arms lower the jar to a safe resting place
